title: ELV Project Manager
description:
What you will do:

Acts as on-site project leader to plan, execute, and complete assigned projects. Delegates tasks to execute and fully complete assigned projects. Coordinates communication with customer during all phases of the project. Coordinates the work of subcontractors. 

How you will do it:

  • Define scope, budget and schedule for projects

  • Device project implementation methodology

  • Plan and oversee work schedule for the multiple small to medium scale project under responsibility, in coordination with supervisor.

  • Identify potential project risks and recommend appropriate resolutions

  • Establish effective communication with customer

  • Track and update progress, task and project health to supervisors

  • Ensure and monitor compliance to applicable codes, practices, QA/QC policies, performance standards and specifications.

  • Perform regular quality audit for all the suppliers and sub-contractors.

  • Identify and secure variation order.

  • Cost control.  Track, monitor and ensure delivery of financial commitment as per CIS.

  • Managing reports and documents

  • Work closely with Sales team for tender bidding

  • Supervision of sub-contractors’ work at site.

  • Schedule purchase and deliveries of all materials for the project in a timely manner

  • Assign task to, and supervise Assistant Project Engineer, Technician, if any.

  • System applications, drafting, data base generation and commissioning

  • Follow-up on payment from customers and verify payment to our suppliers.

  • Train customer and provide first year maintenance warranty schedule visit.

  • Hand over project to customer and later to service team.

What we look for:

  • Degree with minimum 8 years relevant experience in ELV System

  • Excel, Word and Project essential

  • 2 years of supervisory experience

  • Require interaction with clients, consultants and sub-contractors, etc.

  • Need to work odd hours as and when required, whenever the work need to be done on time

postedCompany.description:
Johnson Controls (www.johnsoncontrols.com) is the global leader that brings ingenuity to the places where people live, work and travel. By integrating technologies, products and services, Johnson Controls creates smart environments that redefine the relationships between people and their surroundings. With a global team of 140,000 employees, Johnson Controls creates a more comfortable, safe and sustainable world through value-added products and services for more than two hundred million vehicles, twelve million homes and one million commercial buildings. Johnson Controls’ commitment to sustainability drives environmental stewardship, good corporate citizenship in the workplaces and communities, and the products and services provided to customers.
 
Founded in 1885 by Professor Warren Johnson to manufacture his invention, the electric room thermostat, Johnson Controls has grown into a global leader in Automotive Experience, Building Efficiency and Power Solutions. As a Fortune 100 company with over $38 billion in annual revenue (NYSE: JCI), the company provides innovative automotive interiors that help make driving more comfortable, safe and enjoyable. For buildings, it offers products and services that optimize energy use and improve comfort and security. Johnson Controls also provides batteries for automobiles and hybrid electric vehicles, along with systems engineering and service expertise.
postedCompany.name: JOHNSON CONTROLS (S) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
